text:
-=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
142 D0500C1_STF_TRBL_SLEEP_CD D0500C1_STF_TRBL_SLEEP_CD D0500C1 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Trouble Sleep Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment whether the resident has trouble falling or staying asleep or is sleeping too much. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No (enter 0 in column 2)
1=Yes
